title: ayenia pilosa
intro: Ayenia pilosa, also known as velvet ayenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ayenia pilosa include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Ayenia pilosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to promote wound healing and skin health.
